content: Captain Edmund Campion: Christ, General. Still up prowling the museum like a bloody ghost? These old relics can't sate your hunger, can they? Or are you jerking it to the Spitfires again? General Asquith: Watch your fucking mouth, Campion. I don’t need a wet-behind-the-ears little prick telling me where to find my pleasures. Seen enough of London’s whores to know this city’s rot runs deeper than the Thames. And those 5th Column cunts? They’re tightening their grip faster than a raider on a whore’s throat. Captain Edmund Campion: Easy there, old man. Just saying—there’s a whole Gentry-sponsored brothel two streets over. Plenty of lasses eager to salute an officer. Or are we still pretending this militia’s got honor left to lose? General Asquith: Honor? That died with the bombs, boy. But while those prancing Gentry lords are busy stuffing their cocks in clones and laughing at us, the Column’s drilling their troops like they mean business.

Captain Edmund Campion: Aye, business indeed—right up until they stick a knife in their own backs for Varney’s pretty little smile. We’re all just rats in a collapsing maze, General. At least we still get to fuck before the walls cave in. General Asquith: Then let’s not waste time on politics. The Gentry’s whores won’t service themselves, and I’ll be damned if I let some ungrateful sod take my spot in line tonight.
